title: 決意はドレスにこめて

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for gathering here today,
everyone. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Without further ado, let's begin.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the magnificent Ball Royale, where
fearless princesses dance and do battle!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if I'm up against the older
students—I'm going to be number one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The whole princess thing doesn't suit me, but I
won't lose when it comes to running!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How wonderful to receive an invitation unrelated
to official business! I can't wait to take all sorts of
photos. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, everyone. The first dance will begin in
ten minutes. Please complete your preparations
by then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the "Ball Royale" Kawakami
Princess has been planning for a while. She told
me about the event some time before, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this, Trainer! I'm thinking of holding a
Ball Royale. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It'll be just like the event that Princess Fighter
attended in the original series! My excitement's
through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And just you wait! I'm going to prove that I'm the
most dazzling princess of them all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though it sounds like an elegant dance party,
Kawakami Princess's level of enthusiasm suggests
there's more to it, so I come along to check up on
the event myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, you're here, Trainer! What perfect
timing—we're just about to start running!
choice_data_list: Oh, so the "Ball Royale" is a race event!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's a heated competition where
racers give it their all as they strive to claim
victory!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy that you came to watch! To tell the
truth, you're acting just like the prince from
Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Also known as Legendary Trainer, he supported
the princess when she participated in her own Ball
Royale!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
With your support and with my signature
racewear—my "dress"—I'm at my absolute
strongest today!
choice_data_list: Your signature racewear is... a dress?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right! A dress is the formal attire of a
fighting princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Every single fiber of this signature racewear dress
is packed full of my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This powerful pink represents blazing fighting
spirit mixed with glittering purity.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And the diamonds represent unbreakable will!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This design isn't based on who I am right now, but
rather who I want to be. I want to become
someone who won't put this dress to shame.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Being a princess means having the resolve to
never quit on the path to becoming stronger and
more dazzling than anyone else!
choice_data_list: The dress looks great on you.
Let's show everyone how a real princess runs!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think so too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I had it tailored specifically to suit not the me of
yesterday, not even the me of today, but the me I
plan to become tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please watch me out there, Trainer! I'll show you a
performance worthy of this dress!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now then, everyone, please take your places!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let us create some wonderful memories. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Raaarrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ack, she's fast!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In this dress, I'm going to shine brighter and be
more princess-like than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
AW YEAH! I smashed it! Like a bold and gallant
princess should!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, I was so close! Kawakami, I demand a
rematch! Next time, I'll be number one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gladly! A princess never backs down from a
challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After achieving a brilliant victory in the race,
Kawakami Princess seems to glow with triumphant
radiance.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Naturally! I'm going to smash this race!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now then, everyone, please take your places!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I just have to run with everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm... number ooone!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Wow! Everyone is so fast! But...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Grr... Gaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Just... a little... furtheeeer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Nghhhh, I can't believe this! I was supposed to be
the princess who wins!
choice_data_list:
A true princess would pick herself up and move
on to the next race!

A true princess would pick herself up and move
on to the next race!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, you're completely right. It would be
laughable for a princess to lose heart over such a
small setback!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have you by my side, Trainer. I need to
attack my training with grit and determination.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Then I'll be the belle of the next Ball Royale!
